imaging_request.indication_text: Surveillance CT chest following right upper lobectomy for stage IB NSCLC. Patient overdue for routine follow-up imaging.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of upper lobe, right bronchus
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Pathologic staging pT2aN0M0, Stage IB. Patient missed scheduled 3-month and 6-month surveillance appointments. Now presenting at 8 months post-resection. On osimertinib for EGFR L858R mutation.
